title: Red Supergiant Star
description: Replacing our sun with a Supergiant red star!!
body:
**What if we replace our sun with a bigger one, like supergiant stars??!!!** 

Well this pack will make that change, the Supergiant star is known for its massive size and rare in the universe, it is also superior to giant stars in terms of radius,  But because of its size and mass, this star becomes unstable and approaching to its death. 

## Installation
- Download the file
- Place the file in resourcepack file inside _.minecraft_
- Turn on the pack by moving it to right column _in game_
- Finally you made it!
